title: Tool-Specific Post-Install Hooks
description: Add default post-install hooks for tools that require additional configuration after installation, such as shell integration, PATH setup, or configuration file generation
acceptance_criteria: Tools with shell integration (nvm, rustup, pyenv) have hooks to update shell rc
Tools needing PATH updates have hooks to configure PATH
Tools requiring config files have hooks to generate defaults
Hooks are optional and can be disabled per-tool
Hooks integrate with existing PRD-003 hooks system
Hooks integrate with PRD-008 env vars for PATH management

tasks.title: Define default hooks data structure
tasks.description: Create a system for tools to define their default post-install hooks
subtasks: Add post_install_hook field to ToolSpec struct
Support inline script strings and script file references
Add hook_description for user-facing messages
Support conditional hooks (e.g., only on first install)

tasks.title: Add hooks for shell integration tools
tasks.description: Add default hooks for tools that need shell rc updates
subtasks: nvm: Add hook to source nvm.sh in shell rc
rustup: Add hook to source cargo env in shell rc
pyenv: Add hook to initialize pyenv in shell rc
rbenv: Add hook to initialize rbenv in shell rc

tasks.title: Add hooks for PATH configuration tools
tasks.description: Add default hooks for tools needing PATH setup
subtasks: go: Add GOPATH and GOBIN to PATH
dotnet: Add .dotnet/tools to PATH
composer: Add composer bin to PATH
cargo: Add ~/.cargo/bin to PATH

tasks.title: Add hooks for config file generation
tasks.description: Add default hooks for tools that benefit from default configs
subtasks: git: Offer to set default branch name
docker: Add user to docker group (Linux)
kubectl: Generate kubeconfig if not exists
terraform: Set up plugin cache directory

tasks.title: Integrate with setup flow
tasks.description: Execute default hooks during jarvy setup
subtasks: Check for tool-specific default hooks after install
Respect --no-hooks flag for default hooks too
Show which default hooks will run in dry-run
Allow user to skip specific default hooks

tasks.title: Add CLI flag to list default hooks
tasks.description: Add command to show what default hooks each tool has
subtasks: Add jarvy tools --hooks flag to show hooks
Show hook description and script preview
Indicate which hooks are enabled/disabled

tasks.title: Write tests
tasks.description: Create tests for default hooks functionality
subtasks: Test hook execution after tool install
Test --no-hooks skips default hooks
Test hook visibility in dry-run mode
Test per-tool hook disable in config

tasks.title: Update documentation
subtasks: Document default hooks concept
List tools with default hooks
Show how to disable default hooks
Update adding-tools.md with hook examples

implementation_notes.hook_execution: Default hooks run after user-defined hooks.{tool}.post_install
implementation_notes.shell_detection: Use same shell detection from PRD-008 env module
implementation_notes.idempotency: Hooks should be safe to run multiple times
implementation_notes.feedback: Show clear messages about what each hook does

tools_needing_hooks.description: Source nvm.sh for Node.js version management
Source cargo env for Rust toolchain
Initialize pyenv for Python version management
Configure GOPATH and add go/bin to PATH
Add user to docker group (Linux only)
Set default branch name to main
Add starship init to shell rc
Add zoxide init to shell rc
Add direnv hook to shell rc
Source fzf key bindings and completion

risks.description: Hooks could conflict with user's existing configuration
risks.mitigation: Check for existing config before modifying, use markers

risks.description: Shell rc modifications could break user's shell
risks.mitigation: Reuse PRD-008 shell module with backup support

risks.description: Hooks running unexpectedly could surprise users
risks.mitigation: Clear messaging about what hooks will run, respect --no-hooks
